module_sme_rollup.name: Product Definition & Planning
module_sme_rollup.description: Define products, materials, and production methods; plan demand and capacity.

statements.text: Multi-level BOMs with components, quantities, scrap factors, and effectivity dates.
statements.rationale: Foundation for accurate costing and material planning.

statements.text: Distinguish Engineering BOM from Manufacturing BOM with where-used traceability.
statements.rationale: Supports design changes and manufacturing flexibility.

statements.text: Routings define ordered operations, work centers, setup/run times, and alternate paths.
statements.rationale: Enables accurate scheduling and cost calculation.

statements.text: Demand planning generates forecasts and tracks consumption against plan.
statements.rationale: Drives MRP and S&OP planning cycles.

statements.text: MRP explodes BOMs, nets inventory, and generates planned orders with lead-time offsets.
statements.rationale: Ensures material availability and production sequencing.

statements.text: Rough-cut capacity planning validates critical work centers against S&OP demand.
statements.rationale: Identifies capacity constraints early in planning.

module_sme_rollup.name: Production Execution & Shop Floor Control
module_sme_rollup.description: Create, schedule, and execute work orders with real-time visibility and material tracking.

statements.text: Work orders created from sales orders with automatic material reservation and issue.
statements.rationale: Ensures materials available when production starts.

statements.text: Production scheduling supports infinite/finite capacity with Gantt charts and conflict detection.
statements.rationale: Optimizes resource utilization and identifies bottlenecks.

statements.text: Shop floor operators record timing, downtime, and quality via barcode scanning interface.
statements.rationale: Captures real-time production data for visibility and traceability.

statements.text: Work order status tracked from planned through release, execution, and closure.
statements.rationale: Enables production control and completion visibility.

statements.text: Labour time captured per operation with distinction between direct and indirect activities.
statements.rationale: Supports payroll integration and labour variance analysis.

module_sme_rollup.name: Quality, Compliance & Traceability
module_sme_rollup.description: Ensure product quality, regulatory compliance, and full material genealogy.

statements.text: Inspection plans execute incoming, in-process, and final inspections with acceptance criteria.
statements.rationale: Prevents defects and ensures customer conformance.

statements.text: Non-conformances recorded with cause codes; corrective actions tracked to closure.
statements.rationale: Drives continuous improvement and regulatory compliance.

statements.text: Lot and serial traceability maintained forward to customer and backward to raw materials.
statements.rationale: Enables rapid recall and root-cause analysis.

statements.text: Hazardous materials flagged with safety data sheets and PPE requirements per operation.
statements.rationale: Protects worker safety and ensures regulatory compliance.

statements.text: Worker certifications verified before operation assignment; incidents recorded with actions.
statements.rationale: Maintains safe working environment and audit trail.

statements.text: Certificates of analysis and conformance generated for customer delivery.
statements.rationale: Demonstrates product compliance and supports customer requirements.

module_sme_rollup.name: Cost Management & Financial Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Calculate product costs, track variances, and support period-end financial close.

statements.text: Standard cost rolled up from material, labour, and overhead components per item.
statements.rationale: Provides baseline for variance analysis and inventory valuation.

statements.text: Actual costs captured from work orders and rolled up to finished goods and WIP.
statements.rationale: Enables accurate inventory valuation and profitability analysis.

statements.text: Variances decomposed into purchase price, usage, labour efficiency, and yield categories.
statements.rationale: Identifies root causes of cost deviations for management action.

statements.text: Inventory revalued at period close when standard costs change.
statements.rationale: Ensures accurate financial reporting and COGS adjustment.

module_sme_rollup.name: Performance Monitoring & Continuous Improvement
module_sme_rollup.description: Track OEE, downtime, yield, and equipment health; drive operational excellence.

statements.text: OEE calculated from availability, performance, and quality; displayed on real-time dashboards.
statements.rationale: Provides single metric for equipment and line effectiveness.

statements.text: Downtime categorized by reason; first-pass and rolled-throughput yield tracked by line.
statements.rationale: Identifies improvement opportunities and quality trends.

statements.text: Equipment breakdowns trigger automatic maintenance requests visible to production planners.
statements.rationale: Minimizes unplanned downtime and coordinates production-maintenance.

statements.text: KPI targets configured with alerts when thresholds breach; drill-down from plant to machine.
statements.rationale: Enables proactive management and rapid issue escalation.

statements.text: Mobile devices receive push notifications for quality failures and machine downtime.
statements.rationale: Ensures rapid response to production disruptions.

module_sme_rollup.name: System Integration, Security & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Enable data flow across systems, protect sensitive data, and maintain audit compliance.

statements.text: REST API and EDI protocols connect to accounting, HR, and supply chain partner systems.
statements.rationale: Eliminates manual data entry and ensures data consistency.

statements.text: CSV/Excel import-export and scheduled automated backups support data portability.
statements.rationale: Enables business continuity and data recovery.

statements.text: Role-based access control with single sign-on and two-factor authentication enforced.
statements.rationale: Protects system access and maintains user accountability.

statements.text: Audit trail logs all user logins, data access, and modifications with timestamps.
statements.rationale: Supports regulatory compliance and forensic investigation.

statements.text: Data encrypted at rest and in transit; retention policies auto-delete expired records.
statements.rationale: Meets PSG Cyber Essentials and PDPA data protection requirements.

statements.text: Web-based interface accessible on phones, tablets, and desktops with responsive design.
statements.rationale: Enables shop floor and office access without local installation.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your manufacturing data is accessible, secure, and connected to other business systems. Singapore SMEs need this to let shop-floor staff, planners, and managers access production information from any device—and to comply with data protection regulations that PSG and MAS expect. A typical scenario: your production manager checks real-time output on a mobile phone during a site visit, while your accountant exports costing data to your accounting software without manual re-entry.

Product Engineering.narrative: This family captures the technical blueprint of what you make—the components, quantities, and sequence of steps needed to build each product. SMEs rely on accurate BOMs and routings to avoid costly mistakes, schedule work correctly, and respond quickly when a customer asks 'how long will this take?' For example, when you need to produce a custom assembly, the system tells you exactly which parts to pull and in what order to assemble them.

Production Execution.narrative: This family turns your production plan into real shop-floor action—creating work orders, scheduling them across your machines and people, and capturing what actually happened. SMEs need this to keep production moving on time, avoid bottlenecks, and know instantly if a job is running late. A concrete example: your scheduler assigns a work order to the CNC machine for Tuesday morning, the operator scans it in, records the output, and the system flags if quality issues or delays occur.

Quality & Compliance.narrative: This family embeds quality checks and traceability into every production step, and ensures you meet Singapore's safety and regulatory standards. SMEs must have this to catch defects early, prove compliance to customers and regulators, and quickly trace a problem back to its source. For instance, if a customer reports a faulty unit, you can instantly trace which batch of raw material went into it and which operator ran that job.

Planning & Costing.narrative: This family forecasts demand, calculates what materials and capacity you need, and tells you the true cost of each product you make. SMEs depend on this to avoid stockouts and overstock, plan hiring and machine time, and price products profitably. A typical scenario: your sales forecast predicts a 20% jump in orders next month, the system automatically calculates the raw materials and labour needed, and alerts you if you don't have enough capacity.

Maintenance & Analytics.narrative: This family tracks how well your machines and processes are performing, and coordinates maintenance to prevent unexpected downtime. SMEs need this to maximise uptime, spot trends before equipment fails, and make data-driven decisions about where to invest. For example, your OEE dashboard shows that the injection-moulding line is running at 75% efficiency; you investigate and find a recurring setup delay that, once fixed, could save 5 hours per week.
